title: Designing a Young Artist Persona
scenario: Create a brief persona description for a young artist. The description should include the artist's age, creative interests, and preferred art forms. Use a creative tone and keep the description under 180 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the description meets the word count and tone constraints.
Check if the description includes the required information (age, creative interests, preferred art forms).
Check if the description is clear and easy to understand.
